semantics: These entries annotate deployed-binary applicability for testcases judged not_affected. They do not replace the present/absent labels in curl_deployed.json.

architecture_not_applicable.reason: The patch and vulnerable mechanism are guarded by SIZEOF_SIZE_T == 4, while the deployed binary is ELF64 x86-64.
The vulnerable mechanism is 32-bit size_t allocation wraparound, while the deployed binary is ELF64 x86-64.
